title: Wrangler's Roost
writer: Earle Snell, John Vlahos, Robert Finkle
actors: Ray Corrigan, John 'Dusty' King, Max Terhune
plot: The notorious outlaw Black Bart has reappeared and the Range Busters are sent to investigate. When they find that Black Bart is now a respectable citizen and that someone is impersonating him, they set a trap for the robber.
